headline: Formula One And Salesforce AI Tool Reshapes Fan Engagement And Monetisation Potential
summary: Formula One Group (NasdaqGS:FWON.K) and Salesforce have launched an AI-powered fan companion agent ahead of the 2026 regulation changes. The new tool is built on Salesforce’s Agentforce 360 platform and is designed to provide personalized, real-time information on upcoming technical regulations. The AI companion is part of Formula One Group’s push to grow digital engagement and reach a younger, more tech-focused global audience. Formula One Group, which controls the commercial rights to...

headline: ServiceNow Casts The AI Doomsday Narrative Out Of The Window (Rating Upgrade)
summary: ServiceNow is a high-growth, high-quality, and high-margin software play. Click here to read more about NOW stock and why it is upgraded to Buy.
